results.title: Two women die following harassment in west Delhi
results.description: Two women in West Delhi died after alleged harassment from husbands and in-laws, prompting police investigations into the incidents.

results.title: South Africa at Women’s T20 World Cup 2026: Meet Laura Wolvaardt’s side
results.description: The Proteas have reached the final of the T20 showpiece for the past two editions but have failed to lift the title.
